name: Current Visitors In Premises
query:
SELECT
  v.name as "Visitor:Link/Visitor:120",
  v.full_name as "Full Name::150",
  v.host_employee as "Host Employee:Link/Employee:150",
  v.purpose as "Purpose::150",
  c.name as "Badge:Link/Visitors Registration Card:120",
  v.check_in_time as "Check In Time:Datetime:160"
FROM `tabVisitors Registration Card` c
INNER JOIN `tabVisitor` v ON v.name = c.current_visitor
WHERE c.status = 'Assigned'
ORDER BY v.check_in_time ASC
